slides.headline: Unlock Mental Health Support
slides.body: Empower your students with resources and knowledge.

slides.headline: Recognize Warning Signs
slides.body: Identify early indicators of mental health issues in your students.

slides.headline: Referral Protocols
slides.body: Learn how to connect students with appropriate mental health resources.

slides.headline: Understanding Benefits
slides.body: Explore VA benefits for mental health services.

slides.headline: Supportive Resources
slides.body: Access tools and materials to support student mental health.

slides.headline: Continuous Learning
slides.body: Stay updated on best practices and new resources.

outline.caption: Empower your students with mental health resources and support. Learn how to recognize warning signs, understand appropriate referral protocols, and access VA benefits.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Understanding Benefits,' as it could benefit from a more concise headline to better align with the overall narrative flow.
